text: Thank you for calling the Stark County Treasurer's Office.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: We are open Monday through Friday 8 a.m. to 4 p.m.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Please visit us online at www.lowtaxinfo.com or the county website at www.stark.in.gov.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Then, Treasurer, where a link can be found to view or pay your bill.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: You can also pay your bill by calling 1-877-690-3729 and entering jurisdiction code 2445.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Please press 0 to talk to a live person, or if you're trying to reach a specific person, press 1 for Kelly the Treasurer, 2 for Don the Deputy, and 3 for Tara.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Thank you and have a great day.
speaker: SPEAKER_00
